title: pushing to a registry has `//` prefix
body:
`StringWithinTransport()` from docker is prefixed with `//`. It must have been like this for a long time but I just realized it now. I would love to not print the prefix as Podman does.

```
Successfully pushed //localhost:5000/test:image@sha256:34384895c5fee4805650509e460891bec04571290f73509c08a8fa47aaae4219 
```
